steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: Red provokes “caution and hesitation” in people's responses. If this applies to opposing players facing Manchester United's red uniforms, their inhibited reactions would directly harm their performance.

steps.title: Match the effect to the choices
steps.content:
B captures this directly: opposing players' performance would suffer when red uniforms trigger “caution and hesitation.” A, C, and D each address something unrelated — Manchester United's excitement, fan perception, or Manchester United's skill — missing the causal effect on opposing players.

This matches choice B — B is correct.
